package.name: vehicle_wbt_smartcar_msgs
package.description:
ROS2 message and service definitions for the smartcar-bridge layer. Mirrors the public API surface of the official Baidu SmartCar 2026 MyCar class (car_wrap_2026.py): chassis motion, lane-follow, arm control, peripherals.
All services live under /vehicle_wbt/v1/cmd/...; all state messages represent /vehicle_wbt/v1/state/... topics.
